allowed_conclusions.can_enter_v2_real_machine_dry_run_prepar: Can enter V2 real-machine dry-run preparation, but real write remains prohibited.
allowed_conclusions.complete_minor_p1_before_v2_real_machine: Complete minor P1 items before entering V2 real-machine dry-run preparation.
allowed_conclusions.not_recommended_for_v2_real_machine_dry_: Do not enter V2 real-machine dry-run preparation; P0 blockers remain.

selected_conclusion_label: Can enter V2 real-machine dry-run preparation, but real write remains prohibited.

readiness_items.label: Smoke
readiness_items.reason: Offline replay and compare smoke coverage is available for the current preparation worksheet.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: No dry-run-preparation blocker; real smoke remains explicitly out of scope.

readiness_items.label: Safe
readiness_items.reason: Step-2 safety messaging and export resilience are available without opening real ports.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: No dry-run-preparation blocker; real COM/serial and live write remain prohibited.

readiness_items.label: route_trace
readiness_items.reason: Route traces are produced and diffable as offline review artifacts.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: Real route trace refresh is not allowed in this batch.

readiness_items.label: Fit-Ready
readiness_items.reason: Fit-ready/export artifact paths are covered as offline evidence and resilience tests.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: No real fit-ready acceptance is claimed.

readiness_items.label: completed/progress semantics
readiness_items.reason: Replay/state coverage protects completed and progress semantics from false-green drift.

readiness_items.label: headless entry
readiness_items.reason: The formal V2 headless entry remains the offline launch path for review and simulation.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: Default production entry remains V1; no V2 default switch is allowed.

readiness_items.label: H2O single-route readiness
readiness_items.reason: H2O has diagnostic/offline coverage, but it is not the main replacement route for this phase.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: H2O hardware equivalence and humidity-feedback behavior remain future dry-run/bench questions.

readiness_items.label: CO2 single-route readiness
readiness_items.reason: The narrowed CO2-only skip0 path is usable for replacement-validation preparation in simulation.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: Real-machine dry-run evidence remains pending and must not include live write.

readiness_items.label: single temperature group readiness
readiness_items.reason: The current preparation path is narrowed to one CO2 temperature group, not a full H2O+CO2 group.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: Full single-temperature H2O+CO2 group evidence remains future dry-run preparation work.

readiness_items.label: route trace diff readiness
readiness_items.reason: Route trace diff has structured output and tests for the narrowed replacement path.

readiness_items.label: narrowed skip0 replacement readiness
readiness_items.reason: Third-batch scope is narrowed_skip0_co2_only and the path is usable for preparation.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: cutover_ready remains false; this does not prove full V1 replacement.

readiness_items.label: rollback strategy ready
readiness_items.reason: A fallback guard/SOP is generated with V1 as the unchanged default entry.
readiness_items.remaining_blocker: Dry-run rollback rehearsal remains document-only in this batch.

default_entry.reason: The fourth batch does not switch the default production entry to V2.

preserve_v1_baselines: Current V1 run logs for the production path.
Current V1 exported summaries, raw rows, and coefficient/writeback references.
Current V1 runtime configuration and points source used for comparison.
Known-good V1 sidecar/latest metadata, without rewriting real_primary_latest.
rollback_sensitive_files: real_primary_latest and any real latest pointer
rollback_triggers: Any V2 dry-run preparation attempts to open real write paths.
Any coefficient, zero, span, or calibration-parameter write is attempted.
V2 route trace enters an unexpected route or cleanup cannot restore safe state.
V2 dry-run preparation produces false completed/progress semantics.
V1 baseline outputs, logs, or configs are missing before a dry-run window.
Any default-entry or V1 production path diff appears in review.
rollback_steps: Stop the V2 preparation path and do not retry against real devices.
Keep run_app.py pointed at the existing V1 default entry.
Use the preserved V1 configuration, logs, and output baseline as the operating reference.
Discard or quarantine the failed V2 dry-run artifacts as diagnostic-only evidence.
Record the trigger, artifact paths, and operator/reviewer notes in the worksheet.
Resume only the known-good V1 production workflow after V1 baseline verification passes.
post_rollback_verification: git diff shows no changes to run_app.py or V1 workflow/ui/devices paths.
V1 baseline config and points source are still present.
V1 output/log storage path is still writable by the existing production process.
No real_primary_latest pointer was refreshed by the V2 preparation attempt.
No instrument zero/span/coefficient/calibration parameter write occurred.
prohibited_actions: Do not switch the default entry to V2.
Do not close or delete V1 as a fallback path.
Do not run real compare/real verify from this worksheet.
Do not open real COM/serial or PLC/valve/instrument/PACE control from this batch.
